mapper.select: SELECT l.*, CASE WHEN l.user_type = 1 THEN (SELECT real_name FROM admin WHERE admin_id = l.user_id) WHEN l.user_type = 2 THEN (SELECT real_name FROM teacher WHERE teacher_id = l.user_id) WHEN l.user_type = 3 THEN (SELECT real_name FROM student WHERE student_id = l.user_id) END AS user_name FROM system_log l WHERE l.log_id = #{logId}

SELECT l.*, CASE WHEN l.user_type = 1 THEN (SELECT real_name FROM admin WHERE admin_id = l.user_id) WHEN l.user_type = 2 THEN (SELECT real_name FROM teacher WHERE teacher_id = l.user_id) WHEN l.user_type = 3 THEN (SELECT real_name FROM student WHERE student_id = l.user_id) END AS user_name FROM system_log l ORDER BY l.create_time DESC

SELECT l.*, CASE WHEN l.user_type = 1 THEN (SELECT real_name FROM admin WHERE admin_id = l.user_id) WHEN l.user_type = 2 THEN (SELECT real_name FROM teacher WHERE teacher_id = l.user_id) WHEN l.user_type = 3 THEN (SELECT real_name FROM student WHERE student_id = l.user_id) END AS user_name FROM system_log l WHERE l.user_type = #{userType} ORDER BY l.create_time DESC

SELECT l.*, CASE WHEN l.user_type = 1 THEN (SELECT real_name FROM admin WHERE admin_id = l.user_id) WHEN l.user_type = 2 THEN (SELECT real_name FROM teacher WHERE teacher_id = l.user_id) WHEN l.user_type = 3 THEN (SELECT real_name FROM student WHERE student_id = l.user_id) END AS user_name FROM system_log l WHERE l.user_type = #{userType} AND l.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY l.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO system_log (user_type, user_id, operation, operation_detail, ip_address) VALUES (#{userType}, #{userId}, #{operation}, #{operationDetail}, #{ipAddress})
